race.description: Find Your Stakes Winner @ The Chase (Bm72) Hcp
race.comment: CHEVAL DE BOIS (9) meets BALLPARK much better at the weights after a narrow on-pace second over 1550m on the heavy track at Randwick Kensington. At his top now and can go close from the low gate with Nock's claim. SWIFT LEGEND (2) strong through the line first-up over the unsuitable 1300m with a gritty fifth over 1300m at Warwick Farm. Proven at the trip and looks set for a good campaign. BALLPARK (1) gets map favours again fifth-up after he ploughed through the heavy going to score a nose win over 1550m at Randwick Kensington as fav. Expect Rawiller to get the best out of him again and is adept in all conditions. NAMASTE (6) struck trouble early in the straight first-up when he closed late for a handy fourth over 1400m at this track. Looks to have returned well and capable of figuring prominently. ATTRACTIVENESS (8) underrated filly heading in the right direction. Bumped into a couple of classy types last start when third over 1300m here. Expected to get the trip and can roll forward.
